title: Gradient Descent Optimization Flow for Mean Squared Error
description: A flowchart showing how the gradient of the Mean Squared Error (MSE) is used to iteratively update model parameters to minimize error.
relationships: Prediction and true value (y) compute error
Error is squared and averaged to calculate MSE
Gradient is computed from MSE with respect to parameters
Gradient direction guides parameter update via learning rate (α)
Process repeats until convergence to optimal parameters
